evidenceSnippetOriginal: For non-language courses: Translation is not a neutral act... students should actively check with a convenor whether using generative AI or some other translation system is appropriate. For any language course: There is a very strong presumption against any use of generative AI or other translation program.
evidenceLocator: Section: A note on translation and generative AI
